untranslatable_reason: The three-line strike bearish candlestick pattern is a visual/morphological pattern that cannot be expressed using only the allowed quantitative indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, and bar properties). Pattern recognition requires multi-candle shape analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal specifies a candlestick pattern (three-line strike bearish) that requires shape recognition across multiple candles. Entry condition references pattern completion which cannot be mechanically translated to numeric indicators. Exit conditions were marked AUTHOR_SILENT, so a reversal condition was inferred (close crossing above SMA-5). The 8.81% average decline is historical performance data, not an entry/exit trigger. The regime context (BULL_MARKET) is noted but cannot be directly mapped to the allowed regime operators.
